case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY VS. RODGER IBANEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-14-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-16-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IBANEZ, RODGER $4,703.13 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,003.13, SEE SCANNED DOC
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65931313), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY SERVED AUG-21-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-22-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT IBANEZ, RODGER
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65972019) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66035587) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 66035587) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 66035587) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-16-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED FINANCIAL CASUALTY COMPANY

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66035587) AS TO DEFENDANT IBANEZ, RODGER
